salariesPage.title: Mushaharrada Shaqaalaha
salariesPage.subtitle: Dejiso oo maamul mushaharka bishii ee shaqaale kasta, maareeyaha, iyo darawalka.
salariesPage.empty: Lama helin shaqaale, maareeye, ama darawal.

attendancePage.title: Xaadirinta
attendancePage.subtitle: Calaamadi oo dib u eeg xaadirinta maalinlaha ah ee shaqaale kasta, maareeyaha, iyo darawalka.
attendancePage.empty: Lama helin shaqaale, maareeye, ama darawal.

myAttendancePage.title: Xaadirintayda
myAttendancePage.subtitle: Calaamadi gelitaankaaga marka aad timaaddo, iyo bixitaankaaga marka aad baxdo.
myAttendancePage.historyEmpty: Wali wax xaadirin ah lama diiwaangelin.
